title: RetrospectivePolicy
description: Durable policy controlling retrospective generation behavior. Resolved from charter frontmatter and .kittify/config.yaml at mission boundaries.

enabled.description: Whether retrospective generation runs at mission boundaries.

timing.description: When generation runs relative to mission completion.

failure_policy.description: What to do when generation fails.

write_record.description: Whether the generator persists the record to disk.

apply_proposals.description: Whether the runtime may auto-apply low-risk proposals.

apply_low_risk_changes.description: If true, the runtime may auto-apply proposals whose risk_class == 'low'. Currently only flag_not_helpful qualifies.

apply_structural_changes.description: MUST stay false unless the operator explicitly opts in. Built-in defaults never set this true.

precedence.description: Only meaningful in charter frontmatter. Default behavior: charter wins. Set 'config' to delegate authority to .kittify/config.yaml.

generator.description: Forward-compatible. Currently the runtime supports only 'python' (pure-Python module). Profile invocation may land in a future release.
